title: Cambridge Zero
body: Cambridge Zero is the University of Cambridge's response to climate change. Led by Dr. Emily Shuckburgh, a climate scientist, mathematician and science communicator, it is an interdisciplinary and collaborative initiative created "to harness the full range of the University’s research and policy expertise, developing solutions that work for our lives, our society and our economy".
categories: Climate change organisations based in the United Kingdom
Organisations associated with the University of Cambridge
